opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My eyes are bright red, they feel like they're full of sand, and I can barely see through the constant watering.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Both eyes went red and gritty with watering after a cold and I want to be sure it's not serious.

symptom_narrative.onset: 24h ago in one eye, spread to the other
symptom_narrative.character: red, gritty/sandy, watery discharge, morning crusting (not thick pus), mild lid swelling, blur that clears when wiped
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: sore throat/runny nose 3 days ago; NO severe deep eye pain, no light sensitivity, no halos, vision normal once wiped
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: blurred by tearing; worried about work contacts

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; recent URI; contagion risk to colleagues

objective_data_offered.value: both eyes red with watery discharge and morning crusting, mild lid swelling, visible on video
vision normal once the discharge is wiped; no deep pain, no light sensitivity, no halos
